faqs.question: When is wasp season in Mill Basin?
faqs.answer: Wasp activity in Mill Basin peaks from late spring through early fall, typically May through October. Nests grow largest in late summer (August-September) when wasps are most aggressive. Early season removal is more affordable and safer, but we provide emergency services year-round whenever nests are discovered.
